subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him. His is the glory and grandeur, His the might and sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العزه و العظمه و له القدره و السلطنه و له
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @suffering and imprisonment
